overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian urban district during golden hour. The player navigates industrial streets, crosses intersections, and gazes up at a massive futuristic megabuilding while neon signs and warm sunset lighting illuminate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street beneath overpass with neon-lit storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath an industrial overpass, passing graffiti-covered walls and street furniture

entered.detail: large concrete and steel overpass structure spanning the street ahead
weathered industrial building with metal siding and graffiti
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
tall modern street lamp with horizontal light fixture
illuminated commercial signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive industrial overpass. The street is lined with warehouse buildings featuring neon signs and graffiti. An elevated pedestrian walkway is visible in the distance, and the lighting mixes natural sunset with artificial neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with adult entertainment venue

events.description: player turns right at the intersection to cross the street
player steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the road

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking across the asphalt crosswalk toward the setting sun

notable_agents.action: person walking in the opposite direction across the street

entered.detail: multi-story building with prominent pink neon 'SEX SHOP XXX' signage
tall palm tree visible against the sunset sky
tall glass and steel building reflecting the golden hour light

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at an intersection, revealing a wide open street with a prominent Sex Shop building featuring bright pink neon signage. Crossing the asphalt crosswalk, the scene opens up to show palm trees and distant skyscrapers against the setting sun, transitioning from the enclosed overpass area to a more open commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: open avenue facing sunset with corporate megastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the massive megabuilding tower
black sedan drives past from right to left across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking toward the sunset while looking up at the massive megabuilding tower, observing the architecture

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: massive futuristic glass and steel tower with multiple stacked sections and illuminated windows
small aerial vehicle or drone flying in the sky near the tower
tall vertical neon sign on distant building with red and blue lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking toward the setting sun, the player enters a wide open avenue with long shadows stretching across the asphalt. The camera tilts up to reveal a massive futuristic megabuilding tower dominating the skyline, with flying vehicles passing by. A black sedan crosses the intersection as the warm golden light bathes the glass facade of the tower.

events.description: camera tilts back down from the sky to street level

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward a covered pedestrian bridge, passing vending machines and advertisements

entered.detail: enclosed overhead walkway connecting buildings across the street ahead
large illuminated digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements
street vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level as the player continues walking toward a covered pedestrian bridge in the distance. The surroundings return to a more enclosed urban feel with industrial buildings on both sides, neon advertisement screens, and street vending machines lining the concrete sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a vast, sun-drenched urban plaza before returning to the enclosed city streets. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive overpass, where the dim light of the industrial zone mixes with the neon glow of graffiti-covered warehouses. As the camera turns right at an intersection, the environment opens up into a commercial district, crossing an asphalt street past bright pink neon signage toward a horizon of palm trees and distant skyscrapers. The scene then expands into a wide avenue where the camera tilts upward to reveal a colossal futuristic megabuilding dominating the golden skyline as flying vehicles drift past its glass facade. Finally, the view returns to street level, moving away from the open light and back toward a covered pedestrian bridge lined with vending machines and neon advertisement screens.
